rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF C'EAYSIA CHANICE ALBERTI
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Proof of Personal Service filed does not show that a copy of the order was served as required by CRC 3.1362(d) and it was served by the attorney, who is the petitioner in this case. The Proof of Mailing does not show that a copy of the order was sent as required by CRC 3.1362 and no Declartion re the service address is on file as required by CRC 3.1362(d). Also, the Proof of Mailing is on the civil form, not the mandatory Judicial Council form DE-120 and it, too, is signed by the attorney. The Court to determine whether to grant the petition. No hearing notes will be sent.
